context.goal: Export the currently selected document text to an external plain-text editor.
context.cues: TIAeditor is open on page 4/15 with multiple lines of document text highlighted in magenta; the toolbar contains an 'Export to text' button. After invoking export, a small save/export options dialog appears, then a text editor window opens containing the extracted text.

state_anchor.locator: magenta-highlighted selected text blocks on the document page

anchors.locator: top toolbar button labeled 'Export to text'
OK button in the small save/export dialog

procedure.expect: A small save/export dialog appears over the selected document text, with OK and Cancel buttons.
An external text editor window opens in the upper-left, showing the exported plain text from the selected document content.
